TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Pailasan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kano go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 31 buwan, 89 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 74 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 73%, binah lihuyan s'uli 10%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Pailasan hya' ga Efong. tay 'zil na Pailasan hya' ga Pakala'ac. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pailasan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Pailasan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pailas~ɕan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kano ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli **%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na pailas~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa e*oŋ. taj ʔzil na pailas~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa pakalaʔaʦ~ʨ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ pailas~ɕan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ pailas~ɕan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Pailasan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kano go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 31 buwan, 89 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 74 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 73%, binah lihuyan s'uli 10%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Pailasan hya' ga Efong. tay 'zil na Pailasan hya' ga Pakala'ac. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pailasan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Pailasan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pailas~ɕan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kano ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli **%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na pailas~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa e*oŋ. taj ʔzil na pailas~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa pakalaʔaʦ~ʨ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ pailas~ɕan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ pailas~ɕan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
